top.title: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
top.summary: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

top.title: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
top.summary: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.

top.title: Another woman accuses Swalwell of drugging and raping her in 2018
top.summary: Lonna Drewes accused Swalwell of drugging her drink before assaulting her in a hotel room.

top.title: Man charged with attempted murder over attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
top.summary: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.

top.title: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
top.summary: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?

top.title: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
top.summary: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
